methods.BigDecimal abs():

methods.BigDecimal divide(BigDecimaldivisor):
Returns aBigDecimalwhose value is(this /
 divisor), and whose preferred scale is(this.scale() -
 divisor.scale()); if the exact quotient cannot be
 represented (because it has a non-terminating decimal
 expansion) anArithmeticExceptionis thrown.

Returns a BigDecimal whose numerical value is equal to

methods.BigDecimal setScale(int\u00a0newScale,\n:
Returns aBigDecimalwhose scale is the specified
 value, and whose unscaled value is determined by multiplying or
 dividing thisBigDecimal's unscaled value by the
 appropriate power of ten to maintain its overall value.
